commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared chart hover helper and tests, narrows Cost/Credits/Usage/Plan Utilization hover selection to bar bodies, uses calendar day stepping, and removes visible Cost row detail lines while preserving tooltip details.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and inspected media: current main uses midpoint hover bands and visible Cost detail lines, and the before screenshot shows the over-wide band and inline details. I did not run the macOS app in this read-only review.
